examples: A huge variety of fish, including cod, bream, mussels, salmon and sturgeon, is being farmed, providing food for people all over the world.
The fish soup was made with sea bream sea bass and John dory.
The fish, which included bream, roach and some eels, were released safely in another part of the canal.
The Par 3 course is loaded with water filled with bass and bream.
